notes: Consumer receives request chunks iteratively when streaming uploads are supported.
Long-lived HTTP response yielding event messages.
After connect, path should not be rematched.
Heartbeat and sync are iterative session outputs.
Bidirectional or unidirectional streams yield chunks.
Multipart/form upload may iterate bounded parts.
Bulk REST ops iterate bounded input records.
JSON-RPC batch iterates a bounded array of calls.
Lifecycle events are discrete, not a streaming yield surface.
